description: Analyze the impact of recessions on inflation using the US macroeconomic dataset (usa.gdt). Calculate the quarterly growth rate of real GDP (gdp) using log-differences and define a dummy variable 'recession' for periods where growth is negative. Conduct an Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) regression of Inflation (inf) against the 'recession' dummy and a constant. Save the regression results to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/recession_results.txt.
